Country Metadata And Income Groups

World Bank-like metadata provides ISO3, region, income group, and lending-category fields for country joins.

country_metadata.csvcountry_health_panel.csv

Lending category is included as a useful distractor and should not be confused with income group.

countryiso3regionincome_grouplending_categorymetadata_note
AfghanistanAFGSouth AsiaLow incomeIDA
AlbaniaALBEurope & Central AsiaUpper middle incomeIBRD
AlgeriaDZAMiddle East & North AfricaUpper middle incomeIBRD
AngolaAGOSub-Saharan AfricaLower middle incomeBlend
ArgentinaARGLatin America & CaribbeanUpper middle incomeIBRD
ArmeniaARMEurope & Central AsiaUpper middle incomeIBRD
AustraliaAUSEast Asia & PacificHigh incomeNot classified
AustriaAUTEurope & Central AsiaHigh incomeNot classified
BangladeshBGDSouth AsiaLower middle incomeBlend
BelgiumBELEurope & Central AsiaHigh incomeNot classified
BeninBENSub-Saharan AfricaLower middle incomeBlend
BoliviaBOLLatin America & CaribbeanLower middle incomeBlend
Static Web portal. CSV downloads are served directly from /data/.
